history.notes: Notes module with 6-digit master password, 3 note types (Quick/Daily/Study), tags, AI tools (improve/summarise/translate/explain), full toolbar, export TXT/JSON. Install App button in Settings. Export filenames now use Module_v1.2.0_2026-05-02 format.
4 new modules: Paragraph, Email, Translator, Exercise (Tense/Flash/Vocab/Story), Timezone. Worker contract fixed. Scroll fixed. Shared toolbar component.
Responsive design. Worker proxy restored. Persistent Storage API. Chat layout overhaul.
